---
title: "AI Playground"
---

A hands-on playground for experimenting with LLM internals, training optimization, distributed systems, and GPU performance. Built around a clean, from-scratch LLaMA-style transformer implementation.

Source code lives at [github.com/ggreg/ai_playground](https://github.com/ggreg/ai_playground).

::: {.callout-note title="🏗️ The capstone project: serve your own LLM"}
Every chapter of this book ends with a milestone toward one goal: **design and train your own
small LLM, then serve it through the mini-vLLM inference engine you build** — paged KV cache,
continuous batching, your model's text through your own engine. The milestone map is on
[The Project](docs/PROJECT.md) page; it starts with M1 in the
[Transformer Overview](notebooks/01_transformer_internals/00_transformer_overview.ipynb).
:::

## Start here

- **[Learning Path](docs/LEARNING_PATH.md)** — the 5-phase curriculum from transformer internals to GPU tools
- **[Concepts FAQ](docs/CONCEPTS.md)** — deep dives on embeddings, cross-entropy, bias, and other conceptual questions
- **[Papers](docs/PAPERS.md)** — key papers organized by topic with summaries
- **[Videos](docs/VIDEOS.md)** — curated videos matched to each module (3Blue1Brown, Karpathy, GPU MODE, and more)
- **[The Project](docs/PROJECT.md)** — the capstone thread: every chapter's 🏗️ milestone builds toward training your own LLM and serving it on the mini-vLLM engine

## Notebooks

Interactive notebooks rendered with all outputs and plots. Read them here, run them locally,
or open any chapter on a free GPU via its *Open in Colab* badge:

| Module | Chapters |
|--------|----------|
| Transformer Internals | [Transformer Overview](notebooks/01_transformer_internals/00_transformer_overview.ipynb) · [Attention Mechanisms](notebooks/01_transformer_internals/01_attention_mechanisms.ipynb) (MHA/GQA/MQA) · [Mixture of Experts](notebooks/01_transformer_internals/02_mixture_of_experts.ipynb) |
| Training Optimization | [Training From Scratch](notebooks/02_training_optimization/00_training_from_scratch.ipynb) · [Learning Rate Schedules](notebooks/02_training_optimization/01_learning_rate_schedules.ipynb) · [Mixed Precision](notebooks/02_training_optimization/02_mixed_precision.ipynb) · [Gradient Accumulation](notebooks/02_training_optimization/03_gradient_accumulation.ipynb) · [AdamW From Scratch](notebooks/02_training_optimization/04_adamw_from_scratch.ipynb) |
| Inference Optimization | [Build a Mini vLLM](notebooks/04_inference_optimization/00_mini_vllm.ipynb) — paged KV cache, PagedAttention, continuous batching |
| GPU & NVIDIA Tools | [CUDA Basics](notebooks/05_gpu_nvidia_tools/01_cuda_basics.ipynb) · [SIMT Simulator](notebooks/05_gpu_nvidia_tools/01b_simt_simulator.ipynb) · [Virtual GPU](notebooks/05_gpu_nvidia_tools/01c_virtual_gpu.ipynb) · [SGEMM Optimization](notebooks/05_gpu_nvidia_tools/02_sgemm_optimization.ipynb) |

📍 The map at the top of each page tracks your reading progress — visited pages fill in, and the pulsing dot marks where you are. Progress is stored locally in your browser.

## Running locally

```bash
git clone https://github.com/ggreg/ai_playground.git
cd ai_playground
uv sync --extra dev

# Quick training sanity check (CPU/MPS, ~30 seconds)
uv run python scripts/train.py --config configs/tiny.yaml --max-steps 20
```
